subject: A robed figure in deep blue and green regalia, holding an enormous ornate golden staff, standing amid crashing waves and spiraling blue water magic
description: A wide mid-shot of a tall figure clad in layered blue and green robes covered in ornamental detail — shells, scales, and glittering starfield patterns are visible on the garments. The figure plants a massive golden staff topped with an elaborate finial in the water before them. Enormous crashing waves rise and curl around the figure on both sides, and spiraling tendrils of blue magical water energy coil outward. The pose is commanding and anchored. A green decorative cloak or fins trails behind. The setting is an open sea during a storm, with churning dark water and spray.
foreground: Churning water, base of the staff
background: Crashing waves, stormy sea, spiraling blue magical tendrils
emotion: imposing authority; the figure commands the ocean with total composure
